mapper.select:
WITH base AS ( SELECT s."MonitoringPointID", s."Value" FROM public."SoilDatas" s WHERE s."IsDelete" = false AND lower(btrim(s."SoilAttribute"::text)) = lower(btrim(#{attr}))
AND lower(btrim(s."SoilSamplingTime")) = lower(btrim(#{period}))
AND s."SamplingDate"::text LIKE #{year} || '%'
) SELECT COUNT(*)::int AS n, AVG(base."Value")::float8 AS mean FROM base JOIN public."MonitoringPoints" mp ON mp."MonitoringPointID" = base."MonitoringPointID"
mp."IsDelete" = false
AND lower(btrim(mp."CountyDistrict")) = lower(btrim(#{countyDistrict}))
AND lower(btrim(mp."Town")) = lower(btrim(#{town}))
AND lower(btrim(mp."Village")) = lower(btrim(#{village}))

WITH base AS ( SELECT e."MonitoringPointID", e."Value" FROM public."SoilEnzymeActivityDatas" e WHERE e."IsDelete" = false AND lower(btrim(e."SoilAttribute"::text)) = lower(btrim(#{attr}))
AND lower(btrim(e."SoilSamplingTime")) = lower(btrim(#{period}))
AND e."SamplingDate"::text LIKE #{year} || '%'
) SELECT COUNT(*)::int AS n, AVG(base."Value")::float8 AS mean FROM base JOIN public."MonitoringPoints" mp ON mp."MonitoringPointID" = base."MonitoringPointID"
mp."IsDelete" = false
AND lower(btrim(mp."CountyDistrict")) = lower(btrim(#{countyDistrict}))
AND lower(btrim(mp."Town")) = lower(btrim(#{town}))
AND lower(btrim(mp."Village")) = lower(btrim(#{village}))

WITH base AS ( SELECT t."MonitoringPointID", t."Value" FROM public."TobaccoLeafDatas" t WHERE t."IsDelete" = false AND lower(btrim(t."TobaccoLeafData"::text)) = lower(btrim(#{attr}))
AND lower(btrim(t."SoilSamplingTime")) = lower(btrim(#{period}))
AND t."SamplingDate"::text LIKE #{year} || '%'
) SELECT COUNT(*)::int AS n, AVG(base."Value")::float8 AS mean FROM base JOIN public."MonitoringPoints" mp ON mp."MonitoringPointID" = base."MonitoringPointID"
mp."IsDelete" = false
AND lower(btrim(mp."CountyDistrict")) = lower(btrim(#{countyDistrict}))
AND lower(btrim(mp."Town")) = lower(btrim(#{town}))
AND lower(btrim(mp."Village")) = lower(btrim(#{village}))

WITH base AS ( SELECT w."MonitoringPointID", w."Value" FROM public."WeatherDatas" w WHERE w."IsDelete" = false AND lower(btrim(w."WeatherType"::text)) = lower(btrim(#{attr}))
AND lower(btrim(w."SoilSamplingTime")) = lower(btrim(#{period}))
AND w."SamplingDate"::text LIKE #{year} || '%'
) SELECT COUNT(*)::int AS n, AVG(base."Value")::float8 AS mean FROM base JOIN public."MonitoringPoints" mp ON mp."MonitoringPointID" = base."MonitoringPointID"
mp."IsDelete" = false
AND lower(btrim(mp."CountyDistrict")) = lower(btrim(#{countyDistrict}))
AND lower(btrim(mp."Town")) = lower(btrim(#{town}))
AND lower(btrim(mp."Village")) = lower(btrim(#{village}))

WITH base AS ( SELECT s."MonitoringPointID", s."Value" FROM public."SmokingEvaluationDatas" s WHERE s."IsDelete" = false AND lower(btrim(s."SmokingEvaluation"::text)) = lower(btrim(#{kx}))
AND lower(btrim(s."SoilSamplingTime")) = lower(btrim(#{period}))
AND s."SamplingDate"::text LIKE #{year} || '%'
) SELECT COUNT(*)::int AS n, AVG(base."Value")::float8 AS mean FROM base JOIN public."MonitoringPoints" mp ON mp."MonitoringPointID" = base."MonitoringPointID"
mp."IsDelete" = false
AND lower(btrim(mp."CountyDistrict")) = lower(btrim(#{county}))
AND lower(btrim(mp."Town")) = lower(btrim(#{town}))
AND lower(btrim(mp."Village")) = lower(btrim(#{village}))

WITH x AS ( SELECT s."MonitoringPointID", s."SamplingDate", s."Value" FROM public."SoilDatas" s WHERE s."IsDelete" = false AND lower(btrim(s."SoilAttribute"::text)) = lower(btrim(#{attrX}))
AND lower(btrim(s."SoilSamplingTime")) = lower(btrim(#{period}))
AND s."SamplingDate"::text LIKE #{year} || '%'
), y AS ( SELECT s."MonitoringPointID", s."SamplingDate", s."Value" FROM public."SoilDatas" s WHERE s."IsDelete" = false AND lower(btrim(s."SoilAttribute"::text)) = lower(btrim(#{attrY}))
AND lower(btrim(s."SoilSamplingTime")) = lower(btrim(#{period}))
AND s."SamplingDate"::text LIKE #{year} || '%'
) SELECT AVG(x."Value") AS x, AVG(y."Value") AS y FROM x JOIN y ON y."MonitoringPointID" = x."MonitoringPointID" AND DATE_TRUNC('day', y."SamplingDate") = DATE_TRUNC('day', x."SamplingDate") JOIN public."MonitoringPoints" mp ON mp."MonitoringPointID" = x."MonitoringPointID" WHERE x."Value" IS NOT NULL AND y."Value" IS NOT NULL
AND lower(btrim(mp."CountyDistrict")) = lower(btrim(#{countyDistrict}))
AND lower(btrim(mp."Town")) = lower(btrim(#{town}))
AND lower(btrim(mp."Village")) = lower(btrim(#{village}))
GROUP BY x."MonitoringPointID", DATE_TRUNC('day', x."SamplingDate");

WITH x AS ( SELECT e."MonitoringPointID", e."SamplingDate", e."Value" FROM public."SoilEnzymeActivityDatas" e WHERE e."IsDelete" = false AND lower(btrim(e."SoilAttribute"::text)) = lower(btrim(#{attrX}))
AND lower(btrim(e."SoilSamplingTime")) = lower(btrim(#{period}))
AND e."SamplingDate"::text LIKE #{year} || '%'
), y AS ( SELECT e."MonitoringPointID", e."SamplingDate", e."Value" FROM public."SoilEnzymeActivityDatas" e WHERE e."IsDelete" = false AND lower(btrim(e."SoilAttribute"::text)) = lower(btrim(#{attrY}))
AND lower(btrim(e."SoilSamplingTime")) = lower(btrim(#{period}))
AND e."SamplingDate"::text LIKE #{year} || '%'
) SELECT AVG(x."Value") AS x, AVG(y."Value") AS y FROM x JOIN y ON y."MonitoringPointID" = x."MonitoringPointID" AND DATE_TRUNC('day', y."SamplingDate") = DATE_TRUNC('day', x."SamplingDate") JOIN public."MonitoringPoints" mp ON mp."MonitoringPointID" = x."MonitoringPointID" WHERE x."Value" IS NOT NULL AND y."Value" IS NOT NULL
AND lower(btrim(mp."CountyDistrict")) = lower(btrim(#{countyDistrict}))
AND lower(btrim(mp."Town")) = lower(btrim(#{town}))
AND lower(btrim(mp."Village")) = lower(btrim(#{village}))
GROUP BY x."MonitoringPointID", DATE_TRUNC('day', x."SamplingDate");

WITH x AS ( SELECT t."MonitoringPointID", t."SamplingDate", t."Value" FROM public."TobaccoLeafDatas" t WHERE t."IsDelete" = false AND lower(btrim(t."TobaccoLeafData"::text)) = lower(btrim(#{attrX}))
AND lower(btrim(t."SoilSamplingTime")) = lower(btrim(#{period}))
AND t."SamplingDate"::text LIKE #{year} || '%'
), y AS ( SELECT t."MonitoringPointID", t."SamplingDate", t."Value" FROM public."TobaccoLeafDatas" t WHERE t."IsDelete" = false AND lower(btrim(t."TobaccoLeafData"::text)) = lower(btrim(#{attrY}))
AND lower(btrim(t."SoilSamplingTime")) = lower(btrim(#{period}))
AND t."SamplingDate"::text LIKE #{year} || '%'
) SELECT AVG(x."Value") AS x, AVG(y."Value") AS y FROM x JOIN y ON y."MonitoringPointID" = x."MonitoringPointID" AND DATE_TRUNC('day', y."SamplingDate") = DATE_TRUNC('day', x."SamplingDate") JOIN public."MonitoringPoints" mp ON mp."MonitoringPointID" = x."MonitoringPointID" WHERE x."Value" IS NOT NULL AND y."Value" IS NOT NULL
AND lower(btrim(mp."CountyDistrict")) = lower(btrim(#{countyDistrict}))
AND lower(btrim(mp."Town")) = lower(btrim(#{town}))
AND lower(btrim(mp."Village")) = lower(btrim(#{village}))
GROUP BY x."MonitoringPointID", DATE_TRUNC('day', x."SamplingDate");

WITH x AS ( SELECT w."MonitoringPointID", w."SamplingDate", w."Value" FROM public."WeatherDatas" w WHERE w."IsDelete" = false AND lower(btrim(w."WeatherType"::text)) = lower(btrim(#{attrX}))
AND lower(btrim(w."SoilSamplingTime")) = lower(btrim(#{period}))
AND w."SamplingDate"::text LIKE #{year} || '%'
), y AS ( SELECT w."MonitoringPointID", w."SamplingDate", w."Value" FROM public."WeatherDatas" w WHERE w."IsDelete" = false AND lower(btrim(w."WeatherType"::text)) = lower(btrim(#{attrY}))
AND lower(btrim(w."SoilSamplingTime")) = lower(btrim(#{period}))
AND w."SamplingDate"::text LIKE #{year} || '%'
) SELECT AVG(x."Value") AS x, AVG(y."Value") AS y FROM x JOIN y ON y."MonitoringPointID" = x."MonitoringPointID" AND DATE_TRUNC('day', y."SamplingDate") = DATE_TRUNC('day', x."SamplingDate") JOIN public."MonitoringPoints" mp ON mp."MonitoringPointID" = x."MonitoringPointID" WHERE x."Value" IS NOT NULL AND y."Value" IS NOT NULL
AND lower(btrim(mp."CountyDistrict")) = lower(btrim(#{countyDistrict}))
AND lower(btrim(mp."Town")) = lower(btrim(#{town}))
AND lower(btrim(mp."Village")) = lower(btrim(#{village}))
GROUP BY x."MonitoringPointID", DATE_TRUNC('day', x."SamplingDate");

WITH x AS ( SELECT s."MonitoringPointID", s."SamplingDate", s."Value" FROM public."SmokingEvaluationDatas" s WHERE s."IsDelete" = false AND lower(btrim(s."SmokingEvaluation"::text)) = lower(btrim(#{kx}))
AND lower(btrim(s."SoilSamplingTime")) = lower(btrim(#{period}))
AND s."SamplingDate"::text LIKE #{year} || '%'
), y AS ( SELECT s."MonitoringPointID", s."SamplingDate", s."Value" FROM public."SmokingEvaluationDatas" s WHERE s."IsDelete" = false AND lower(btrim(s."SmokingEvaluation"::text)) = lower(btrim(#{ky}))
AND lower(btrim(s."SoilSamplingTime")) = lower(btrim(#{period}))
AND s."SamplingDate"::text LIKE #{year} || '%'
) SELECT AVG(x."Value") AS x, AVG(y."Value") AS y FROM x JOIN y ON y."MonitoringPointID" = x."MonitoringPointID" AND DATE_TRUNC('day', y."SamplingDate") = DATE_TRUNC('day', x."SamplingDate") JOIN public."MonitoringPoints" mp ON mp."MonitoringPointID" = x."MonitoringPointID" WHERE x."Value" IS NOT NULL AND y."Value" IS NOT NULL
AND lower(btrim(mp."CountyDistrict")) = lower(btrim(#{county}))
AND lower(btrim(mp."Town")) = lower(btrim(#{town}))
AND lower(btrim(mp."Village")) = lower(btrim(#{village}))
GROUP BY x."MonitoringPointID", DATE_TRUNC('day', x."SamplingDate");
